subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Praise thou God inasmuch as He hath created thee, sustained thee, nurtured thee, and given thee to drink from the Kawthar of divine knowledge. We render thanks unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد ان احمد الله بما خلقک و رزقک و رباک و سقاک کوثر العرفان انا نشکر الله
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
